case_title: CLARK, MARILYN NELSON VS WEAVER, STEPHEN L. DBA WEAVER AUTOMOTIVES et al

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 766017 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARK, MARILYN NELSON AS TO DEFENDANT WEAVER, STEPHEN L. DBA WEAVER AUTOMOTIVES SCHERBA'S AUTO STORE, INC. WEAVER, NANCY
COPIES OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFT.
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGEMENT AND APPLICATION SENT TO STEPHEN WEAVER, RETURNED. NO LONGER AT THE ADDRESS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CLARK, MARILYN NELSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEAVER, STEPHEN L. DBA WEAVER AUTOMOTIVES WEAVER, NANCY $796.99 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $816.99, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT SCHERBA'S AUTO STORE INC. DEFT NANCY WEAVER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE #766017 JUDGMENT ENTERED ON NOVEMBER 6, 1997. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $200.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $562.86 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT WEAVER, STEPHEN L. DBA WEAVER AUTOMOTIVES
(PROOF OF MAILING) OF THE APPLICATION & NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT; & MEMORANDUM OF COST AS TO DEFENDANT FILED.
